events.text: AAPL reported Q1 FY24 earnings after market close on 2024-02-01. Revenue $119.6B (+2% YoY), beat consensus. iPhone revenue down 1% YoY; Services hit $23.1B record. Greater China revenue down 13% YoY. Guidance for Q2: flat revenue YoY.
Analysts zero in on Greater China revenue decline as the main disappointment in Apple's quarter, with multiple firms citing iPhone competition from Huawei.
Berkshire Hathaway trimmed AAPL position by 1.0% quarter-over-quarter in the filing reported 2024-02-14 (as of 2023-12-31).

text_chunks.text: On Greater China: 'Revenue in the region was down 13% year-over-year, impacted by foreign exchange and competitive dynamics in the smartphone market.' Luca Maestri.
Huawei's resurgent smartphone lineup has pressured iPhone sales in mainland China, with multiple analysts calling out the competitive dynamic as the biggest incremental risk to FY24 guidance.
